title: Histerical History Improvised
description: Winston Churchill enjoying yoga and matcha lattes; French revolutionaries working for Big Tech; Queen Victoria eating tripe out of a trough - impossible scenes, you might think - but not when History is Improvised! Histerical is an improvised jaunt through the history that you didn’t learn at school - because it never happened! Anything is possible in this 60-minute show in which we transport you to any historical era your little minds can think of - Regency? Ancient Egypt? Renaissance Italy? That bit between people wearing long wigs and when they started wearing tricorne hats? Literally anything - within the bounds of taste - is up for grabs! Want to learn about the past? This is the WRONG show for you - we remix the past! And we’re not going to just show you the big figures from history - there’s space for the little people from history too! So, what are you waiting for? Join us on our historically hysterical journey into lies and laughter.
content_warnings: Histerical is completely improvised every time - though care is taken to avoid triggers, themes and content cannot be predicted

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
